headline: Gen Brings Trusted Financial Intelligence to Microsoft's Copilot Discover Feeds
summary: Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), a global company dedicated to powering Digital Freedom, announced today it is integrating Engine by Gen directly into Microsoft products like Copilot, MSN and Bing, bringing trusted, compliant financial information and relevant offers into AI-powered experiences across Microsoft. The integration helps provide easier access to trusted, personalized information that empowers users to make more confident financial decisions.
